name: password-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for generating secure passwords, passphrases, and checking password strength. Zero external deps.

tools.name: generate_password
tools.description: Generate a cryptographically secure random password.

tools.name: generate_passphrase
tools.description: Generate a memorable passphrase from random words (XKCD-style).

tools.name: check_strength
tools.description: Analyze password strength — length, charset diversity, entropy estimate, and tips.
